message:
fix(polyfills): fix Buffer lookup and URL parsing issues

crypto.js:
- Add getBuffer() helper for runtime Buffer lookup
- Fix randomFillSync, getRandomValues, Cipher, Decipher classes
  that were failing with "cannot read property 'isBuffer' of undefined"
- Add crypto.getRandomValues() directly on crypto module
- All crypto methods now lookup Buffer at call time instead of
  capturing undefined Buffer at module initialization

runtime.js:
- Fix URL class to handle userinfo (user:pass@host)
- Fix hostname regex to exclude ?# characters, allowing URLs
  like https://example.com?q=1 to parse correctly
- Add username/password properties to URL class
